name: Fat Free Oatmeal Raisin Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray cookie sheets with non-stick cooking spray.
2. Combine dry ingredients and raisins in a large bowl.
3. Add egg whites, corn syrup, and vanilla. Stir until well blended (the dough will be stiff).
4. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto the prepared cookie sheets.
5. Bake in a 375 degree F oven for 10 minutes or until just firm. Do not overbake.
6. Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack.
Each cookie is 0 grams fat, 0 grams cholesterol, 60 calories, 1 gram protein, 13 grams carbohydrate, and 65 milligrams sodium.
